context: Evaluates the agent's ability to rewrite a basic anti-patterns section into the full NEVER/WHY/BAD/GOOD structure required for D3 scoring, expanding coverage while maintaining each entry's structural integrity.

checklist.name: NEVER phrasing
checklist.description: Each anti-pattern leads with NEVER: [action] phrasing

checklist.name: WHY explanation
checklist.description: WHY explanation provided for each anti-pattern

checklist.name: Consequence description
checklist.description: Consequences of violating each anti-pattern described

checklist.name: Coverage breadth
checklist.description: At least 3 distinct anti-patterns identified and documented
